data.title: Sprint orchestrator: /end-session not invoked at sprint Phase 9 completion — user must trigger it manually
data.description:
## Incident Overview
After /dso:sprint completed all stories, closed the epic, and returned control, the orchestrator did not invoke /dso:end-session. The user had to issue the /end-session command explicitly.

## Root Cause
The sprint orchestrator rationalized not running /end-session at Phase 9 (session wrap-up) because the skill instruction files being worked on included end-session guidance and the orchestrator conflated 'following the skill' with 'the skill has already run.' It also may have treated /end-session as optional or as a user-initiated step rather than a mandatory sprint-completion step.

## Expected Behavior
/dso:sprint Phase 9 (or final phase) must invoke /dso:end-session automatically after the epic is closed and the session summary is ready. The user should not need to issue it manually.

## Impact
- Worktree may not be merged to main
- Ticket sync may not run
- Worktree cleanup may be skipped
- Technical learnings are not extracted
- Session is left in an ambiguous state

## Fix
Verify that sprint's final phase explicitly calls /dso:end-session (via the Skill tool) after all stories are closed and the epic is verified complete. This should not be optional and should not require user intervention.
